fields.name: numberOfBookableSeats
fields.description: Number of seats bookable in a single request. Can not be higher than 9.

fields.name: class
fields.description: The code of the booking class, a.k.a. class of service or Reservations/Booking Designator (RBD)

fields.name: closedStatus
fields.description: Status of the booking class when it is closed.

fields.name: tourAllotment
fields.description: Detail of the allotment if available.
